settings.heading: DELIVERY WITHOUT NOISE
settings.body: Orders dispatch in 1-3 business days. Final delivery timing and available methods are shown at checkout based on the shipping address.
settings.card_1_text: Your order is checked, packed, and prepared for dispatch.
settings.card_2_text: Tracking details are shared when the shipment is ready.
settings.card_3_text: Contact the store if you need help before or after checkout.
